---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for Junior Math Quest
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ashishpanchal
---

## Problem Statement

A clear description of the problem or need this feature addresses.
Example: "My child finds it frustrating when..."

## Proposed Solution

A clear description of what you'd like to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

A description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Target Age Group

- [ ] Ages 4-5 (Pre-K)
- [ ] Ages 5-6 (Kindergarten)
- [ ] Ages 6-7 (1st Grade)
- [ ] Ages 7-8 (2nd Grade)
- [ ] All ages

## Additional Context

Add any mockups, screenshots, or references that help explain the feature.
